phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praia do Ourigo is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a Praia do Ourigo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH PREYEUH DOO oow-REE-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Praia do Ourigo is a beach at the mouth of the Douro, near the lighthouse.

likely_response.translation_en: Follow the Marginal until you get there.

responses.english: Follow the Marginal until you get there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praia do Ourigo is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praia do Ourigo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah ah PRY-ah doo oh-REE-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Praia do Ourigo is a small beach near the mouth of the Douro, popular with surfers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the Marginal de Foz
phrases.text_local: Como encontro a Marginal de Foz?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh en-KOHN-troo ah mar-zhee-NAHL deh FOHSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Marginal de Foz is the waterfront promenade stretching along the Douro estuary.

likely_response.local: Siga pela estrada junto ao rio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh PEH-luh SHTRAH-duh ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the road by the river.

responses.english: Follow the road by the river.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh PEH-luh SHTRAH-duh ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO.
responses.french: Siga pela estrada junto ao rio.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praia do Ourigo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PREYEUH DOO oow-REE-goo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praia do Ourigo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH DOO oow-REE-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praia do Ourigo.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praia do Ourigo.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH DOO oow-REE-goo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Praia do Ourigo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Forte do Queijo is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizado o Forte do Queijo?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH lo-kah-lee-ZAH-doo-w-oo FOR-chee-doo KAY-zhoo (liaison: -w- sound links "localizado" to "o")
phrases.cultural_note: Named after a shipwrecked cheese cargo in the 18th century.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na ponta da Avenida do Mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH POHNG-tuh DUH uh-vih-NEE-duh DOO MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the end of Avenida do Mar.

responses.english: Good day, at the end of Avenida do Mar.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH POHNG-tuh DUH uh-vih-NEE-duh DOO MAHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, na ponta da Avenida do Mar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Jardim do Passeio Alegre is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Jardim do Passeio Alegre?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO puh-SAYOO uh-LEHG-rih?
phrases.cultural_note: Jardim do Passeio Alegre is a scenic garden along the Douro riverbank in Foz.

likely_response.translation_en: It's on the Marginal de Foz waterfront.

responses.english: It's on the Marginal de Foz waterfront.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the Marginal de Foz
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Marginal de Foz a pé?
phrases.pronunciation: COH-moo CHEH-goo AH mar-ZHEE-ow jee-FOHZ ah PEH
phrases.cultural_note: The promenade is famous for sunset walks along the estuary.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga pela avenida à beira-mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh PEH-luh uh-vih-NEE-duh AH BAY-ruh-MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, follow the avenue by the sea.

responses.english: Good day, follow the avenue by the sea.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh PEH-luh uh-vih-NEE-duh AH BAY-ruh-MAHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga pela avenida à beira-mar.

phrases.text_local: Você conhece um bom restaurante aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH koo-NYEH-sih OONNG BOHNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Sim, o café na Marginal de Foz é uma boa opção.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, AW kuh-FEH NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DIH FAWSH EH OO-muh BOHUH awp-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the café on Marginal de Foz is a good option.

responses.english: Yes, the café on Marginal de Foz is a good option.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, AW kuh-FEH NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DIH FAWSH EH OO-muh BOHUH awp-SOWN.
responses.french: Sim, o café na Marginal de Foz é uma boa opção.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Jardim do Passeio Alegre is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente o Jardim do Passeio Alegre?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals often refer to it simply as Jardim da Foz.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado do forte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DOO FAW-ruh-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, it is next to the fort.

responses.english: Good day, it is next to the fort.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DOO FAW-ruh-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica ao lado do forte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praia do Ourigo is
phrases.text_local: Onde podemos encontrar a Praia do Ourigo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih poo-DEH-moosh ayng-koongt-RAHR AH PREYEUH DOO oow-REE-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Known for consistent waves and active surf schools.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, entre o forte e o farol.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AYNGT-rih AW FAW-ruh-tih EH AW fuh-RAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, between the fort and the lighthouse.

responses.english: Good day, between the fort and the lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AYNGT-rih AW FAW-ruh-tih EH AW fuh-RAWL.
responses.french: Bom dia, entre o forte e o farol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach kiosk surfboard rentals are
phrases.text_local: Onde alugam pranchas de surf na praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih uh-LOO-guhng PRAHNNG-shuhsh DIH SOO-ruhf NUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Rentals operate seasonally directly beside the water's edge.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Farol do Molhe do Douro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW fuh-RAWL DOO MAW-lyih DOO DOHW-roo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Farol do Molhe do Douro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DOO MAW-lyih DOO DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Molhe do Douro Lighthouse.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Molhe do Douro Lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DOO MAW-lyih DOO DOHW-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Farol do Molhe do Douro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Farol do Molhe do Douro is
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica o Farol do Molhe do Douro?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW fuh-RAWL DOO MAW-lyih DOO DOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Access requires walking the stone pier out to the river mouth.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no final do molhe norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO fee-NAHL DOO MAW-lyih NAW-ruh-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the end of the north jetty.

responses.english: Good day, at the end of the north jetty.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO fee-NAHL DOO MAW-lyih NAW-ruh-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, no final do molhe norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Marginal de Foz is
phrases.text_local: Onde começa exatamente a Marginal de Foz?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DIH FAWSH?
phrases.cultural_note: The paved walkway runs continuously along the Douro estuary.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Marginal de Foz.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DIH FAWSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Marginal de Foz.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Marginal de Foz.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DIH FAWSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Marginal de Foz.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Forte do Queijo is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Forte do Queijo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW FAW-ruh-tih DOO KAY-zhoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Forte do Queijo is a 17th-century fortress at the western tip of Foz do Douro.

likely_response.translation_en: It's at the end of the Marginal.

responses.english: It's at the end of the Marginal.
